title: WOMEN'S HEALTH - 211info
text: WEST SALEM CLINIC WOMEN'S HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Pap smears and breast exams. 1233 Edgewater Street NW Salem, OR 97304 Eligibility: Uninsured women Hours: Monday-Friday 8:15am-5pm (503) 480-1643 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 480-1643 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 7:30am-5:30pm Services: Breast Examinations Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN ENROLLEMENT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH AND CONNECTION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE TRANSPORTATION - MEDICAL BUS AT HOAP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WEST SALEM CLINIC
